# forktrust

> Safe-by-default git worktree manager for parallel AI coding agents. Refuse-on-conflict merges. Never-lose-WIP guarantee. Per-worktree port allocation. One command (`forktrust agent-docs`) to teach any AI how to use it.

Install: `brew install binkovsky/forktrust/forktrust`

## Core docs

- [README](https://github.com/binkovsky/forktrust/blob/main/README.md): full feature list, install, comparison table vs gtr/gwq/wtp/workz/claude-squad
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/binkovsky/forktrust/blob/main/AGENTS.md): how AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Aider, Codex) should use the tool
- [LICENSE](https://github.com/binkovsky/forktrust/blob/main/LICENSE): MIT

## Workflow

The canonical loop, in three commands:

```bash
forktrust new <slug>      # create isolated worktree at .forktrust/worktrees/<slug>
# ... edit files there (NOT in main checkout) ...
forktrust finish <slug>   # commit WIP + merge to main + push + cleanup
```

To abandon without merging (WIP is snapshotted to `wip/<branch>-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS-<sha7>` on origin first):

```bash
forktrust rm <slug>
```

## .forktrustconfig (per-repo, committed)

```toml
[ports]
range = "3000-3099"
size  = 10
vars  = ["PORT", "NEXT_PUBLIC_PORT"]

[[hooks.post_create]]
type = "copy"
from = ".env"
to   = ".env"

[[hooks.post_create]]
type = "symlink"
from = "node_modules"
to   = "node_modules"

[[hooks.post_create]]
type = "command"
run  = "pnpm install"   # requires `forktrust trust`
```

## Stable exit codes (will not change across releases)

| Code | Meaning |
|---|---|
| 0 | success |
| 2 | merge conflict (refuse to auto-resolve) |
| 3 | main worktree is dirty |
| 4 | push failed |
| 5 | wip/* push failed (worktree NOT removed) |
| 6 | no worktree matching slug |
| 7 | slug matches multiple projects |
| 8 | hook failed or untrusted command hook |
| 9 | no origin remote configured |
| 10 | main checkout on wrong branch |
| 11 | cwd is in unregistered git repo |
| 12 | rm/finish could not determine ahead count |
| 13 | rm: worktree removed but branch -D failed |

- [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/binkovsky/forktrust/releases)
- [Homebrew tap](https://github.com/binkovsky/homebrew-forktrust)
